title: Premier Housewares Dish Drainer Grey Lime Green Dish Drainer Rack Dish Rack Cutlery Drainer Sink Drainer Draining Board Kitchen Rack
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Practical Design, the dish drainer has flexible prongs for stacking and holding mugs and glasses
Hygiene Insured, all parts of dish drainer rack can be quickly detached for a more hygienic clean
Portability Enhanced, removable portable cutlery for putting away your cutlery and utensils neatly
Care Instructions, wash all parts in soapy water, rinse and towel dry do not use abrasive cleaners
Ideal for Use, dish rack drainer with tray has ideal size height 11 cm x width 43 cm x depth 32 cm
description: Product Description The dish drainer rack with tray is ideal for use in the kitchen, which helps to drain out any water from the washed and cleaned dishes. It is the perfect fit which ensures that all your kitchen items and cutlery is clean and hygiene is maintained. It is suitable for placing anywhere in the kitchen because of its appropriate size and perfect dimensions. The kitchen drainer rack may also be used invariably for placing dirty dishes which have to be cleaned in order to avoid extra mess and dirt around the kitchen. The kitchen draining board rack is an ideal option to move portable cutlery and to put it anywhere around the kitchen. It can also be detached in order to provide you with an increasingly neat and clean wash. It also ensures that your kitchen remains clean and organised. This disk draining board with drip tray serves a multitude of purposes in the kitchen and it should definitely be used in order to ensure hygiene. It is designed in an elegant and useful manner which allows it to facilitate any kitchen activities and it lessens your time spent in the kitchen. Box Contains 1 x Premier Housewares Grey/Lime Green Dish Drainer
